channel.title: SB 5877 - Making a technical correction to the surcharges authorized for certified anesthesiologist assistants.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍Taylor Bacharach-Nixon - Washington Medical Commission
item.description: Taylor Bacharach-Nixon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Medical Commission.

item.title: First reading, referred to Health & Long-Term Care.
item.description: First reading, referred to Health & Long-Term Care.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Health & Long-Term Care.

item.title: 👍Chris Bundy - Washington Physicians Health Program
item.description: Chris Bundy signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Physicians Health Program.

item.title: 👍💵Carolyn Logue - WA Academy of Anesthesiologist Assistants
item.description: Carolyn Logue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Academy of Anesthesiologist Assistants. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: HLTC - Majority; do pass.
item.description: HLTC - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-01-22/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading consent calendar.
item.description: Placed on second reading consent calendar.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
